storyboard_markdown:
# Scene Contract: CH001_SC002

## Production Intent
Execute the physical transition of the farmhouse from a grounded structure to an airborne vessel via high-pressure wind forces. The sequence requires synchronized movement between interior debris, character reaction, and external VFX sky/ground shifts to simulate violent displacement.

## Required Cast
- dorothy (Young human girl, expressive face)
- toto (Indirectly present)

## Required Environments
- farmhouse_interior_and_cellar (One-room, Kansas prairie setting)
- cyclone_storm_void (High-velocity wind/cloud environment)

## Continuity Constraints
- Interior objects flying through air
- Rapidly shifting light levels from cloud rotation
- Dust and debris movement directionality

## Beat List
- BT001: Dorothy attempts to reach the cellar amidst rising wind.
- BT002: The cyclone strikes the house with massive force.
- BT003: The house is ripped from the ground and lifted into the air.
